title: Print Equipment Monitoring System Review：Print Machine Io T、Equipment Maintenance Management(EAM)and OEE Analysis System Comparison｜2026 Review
description: Professional Review2026 Print Equipment Monitoring System Print Machine Io T、Equipment Maintenance Management(EAM)、OEE Analysis System，Comparison Equipment
content:
Print Equipment Monitoring Efficiency Value and Data Dynamic

Print Equipmentis Print Enterprise Core Asset Management，Equipment Efficiency Direct Connection Impact Production Abilityand Cost。Legacy System Equipment Management Depend Person Work Record、Task After Maintenance，Equipment Empty Rate High、Cause Failure Response Slow。Equipment Monitoring System Communication ProcessReal-time Data Adopt Integration、Status Monitoring、Efficiency AnalysisImprove Equipment Utilization15-20%，Reduce Cause Failure Stop Machine30%。

Print Equipment Management Pain Point：

  • Equipment Empty Rate High：Equipment Empty Time Occupy Comparison High（Occupy Comparison35%）
  • Cause Failure Response Slow：Equipment Cause Failure Currentand Response Slow（30%）
  • Efficiency Not Transparent Clear：Equipment Efficiency Data Not Transparent Clear（20%）
  • Maintenance Not Calculation Planning：Maintenance Missing Calculation Planning Nature（15%）

2026 Print Equipment Monitoring CurrentPrint Machine Io TReal-time Data Adopt Integration、EAM Equipment Maintenance Management、OEE Efficiency Analysis3 Solution。

Print Machine Io TCommunication ProcessTransmission Device、PLC Data Adopt IntegrationReal-time Gain Get Equipment Status Data。

  • Status Monitoring：Equipment Operation Execution Status Real-time Monitoring
  • Cause Failure Warning：Equipment Cause Failure Warning、Difference Common Report Warning
  • Data Up Report：Equipment Data Up Reportto Management System
  • Process Diagnosis Break：Equipment Process Diagnosis Break

EAM（Enterprise Asset Management）FocusEquipment Maintenance Management，Management Print Equipment Complete Generate Week Period。

Pre Prevention Nature Maintenance Reduce Cause Failure Stop Machine30%。

  • Print MIS Equipment Model Module：Included in MIS License

OEE（Equipment Summary Integration Efficiency）Analysis System Review

Equipment Efficiency Analysis Tool

OEE（Overall Equipment Effectiveness）isEquipment Summary Integration Efficiency Indicator Standard，Analysis Equipment Utilization、Nature Ability Rate、Quality Volume Rate。

OEE Calculation

  • Utilization(Availability)：Equipment Operation Execution Time/Calculation Planning Time
  • Nature Ability Rate(Performance)：Implementation International Production Volume/Management Feedback Production Volume
  • Quality Volume Rate(Quality)：Integration Format Product/Total Production Volume
  • OEE = Utilization × Nature Ability Rate × Rate

OEE Analysis Software

  • OEE Software：OEE Analysis Professional Software
  • MIS OEE Model Module：EFI Pace Wait MIS Integration OEE Analysis
  • Auto Main Open Development：Print Business Auto Main Open Development OEE Analysis

OEE Core Function

  • OEE Real-time Calculation：Equipment OEE Real-time Calculation
  • OEE Analysis：Equipment OEE Analysis、Comparison
  • Damage Loss Analysis：Equipment Damage Loss Original Analysis（Stop Machine、Speed Degree Damage Loss、Quality Volume Damage Loss）
  • Change Progress Tracking：OEE Change Progress Tracking

User Review Price

Print Business Recognizes OEE Analysis Equipment Efficiency Transparent Clearization，Change Progress Method Direction Clear Confirm。but OEE Need Data Adopt Integration Solutionsupport Support，Small Factory Data Adopt Integration Insufficient。

Price

  • OEE Software：$10,000-$20,000 License Available
  • MIS OEE Model Module：Included in MIS License
